name: La Cienega Jewelry & Loan
description_short: La Cienega Jewelry & Loan is a Los Angeles-based pawn and jewelry retailer operating since at least the 1990s, selling fine jewelry, watches, and designer items through eBay with a 98.2% positive feedback rating.
description_long:
La Cienega Jewelry & Loan is a physical pawn shop and jewelry business located at 1540 S. La Cienega Boulevard in Los Angeles, California 90035, with a phone number of 310-659-1274. The business operates during extended hours: 10:00 AM–6:30 PM Monday through Friday, and 10:00 AM–5:30 PM on Saturdays. The company has established itself as a secondary market dealer in fine jewelry and luxury goods, leveraging eBay as a major sales channel with over 6,000 items sold and 1,200 followers.

Based on their eBay storefront, La Cienega Jewelry & Loan specializes in sourcing and reselling high-end jewelry inventory including fine jewelry in 10K and 14K gold, diamond jewelry, vintage and antique pieces, designer watches (dress watches, fashion designer watches, men's watches, sports watches), engagement and wedding jewelry, and designer shoes. Their catalog suggests they acquire inventory through typical pawn operations—accepting collateral-based loans on jewelry and luxury goods, then reselling unclaimed items or merchandise obtained through liquidation.

What distinguishes La Cienega Jewelry & Loan is their successful transition to omnichannel retail through eBay, maintaining a strong 98.2% positive feedback rating across thousands of transactions. This suggests competent authentication, accurate product descriptions, and reliable customer service. Their inventory spans both contemporary fine jewelry and genuine vintage/antique pieces, indicating expertise in valuation and sourcing. The physical retail location provides a traditional pawn shop experience for local customers in Los Angeles seeking loans against jewelry or purchasing second-hand luxury goods.

An honest assessment reveals that La Cienega Jewelry & Loan functions primarily as a reseller on eBay rather than prominently advertising consumer loan services on their web presence. While the company name includes "& Loan," the available website content does not detail loan terms, interest rates, loan-to-value ratios, or typical loan amounts—critical information for consumers considering pawn loans. The eBay storefront emphasizes product sales rather than pawn services, suggesting the loan function may be secondary or primarily local to their physical location. Prospective borrowers should contact them directly at their Los Angeles address or phone number to discuss collateral-based lending terms and conditions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 98.2% positive feedback rating on eBay across 6,000+ transactions demonstrates reliability and accurate product representation
Specializes in authenticated fine jewelry with specific karat weights, gemstone details, and designer provenance listed in product descriptions
Inventory includes genuine vintage and antique pieces, suggesting expertise in valuation of collectible jewelry
Extended business hours (10 AM–6:30 PM weekdays, 10 AM–5:30 PM Saturdays) accessible to Los Angeles customers
Physical retail location at established South La Cienega Boulevard address provides in-person consultation and immediate transactions
Carries both contemporary and luxury brand items (Tiffany & Co., designer shoes), indicating professional sourcing and authentication
1,200+ eBay followers and active marketplace presence suggests established customer base and repeat business
cons: Website provides no transparent information about loan terms, APR, loan-to-value ratios, or typical loan amounts available
Pawn loan services not prominently featured or detailed on eBay storefront; primary online presence is product resale rather than lending
No documentation of licensing, regulatory compliance, or consumer loan disclosures publicly available on provided website
Limited online accessibility for prospective borrowers—no dedicated loan application, calculator, or rate information
eBay storefront is in Portuguese and English mix, creating potential language barriers for some consumers
best_for: Los Angeles-area consumers seeking quick collateral-based loans against jewelry or luxury goods with same-day access
Buyers seeking authenticated fine jewelry and vintage pieces with detailed specifications and strong seller track record
Individuals with high-value jewelry willing to pawn items at competitive rates through an established, reputable local business
diagnosis: La Cienega Jewelry & Loan is best for Los Angeles-area residents seeking short-term collateral loans against jewelry or those buying authenticated fine jewelry through eBay. The primary caveat is that loan-specific terms, rates, and conditions are not disclosed online—interested borrowers must contact the physical location directly to understand pawn loan offerings, as the public web presence emphasizes jewelry resale over lending services.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans against jewelry and luxury goods
Fine jewelry sales (10K, 14K, and 18K gold pieces with diamond and gemstone settings)
Vintage and antique jewelry sourcing and sales
Designer watch sales (dress watches, fashion designer watches, men's watches, sports watches)
Authenticated diamond jewelry evaluation and sales
In-person jewelry consultation and valuation at Los Angeles retail location
Gold and precious metal jewelry resale
